advanced.seo_audit_issue_additional_results_trunc: More issues may exist; only the first {{limit}} are shown.
advanced.seo_audit_issue_blog_post_meta_missing: Blog post “{{title}}” ({{path}}) is missing a meta title or description.
advanced.seo_audit_issue_canonical_generation_dis: Canonical URL generation is disabled, which creates a duplicate-content risk.
advanced.seo_audit_issue_cms_page_meta_title_miss: CMS page “{{title}}” ({{path}}) is missing a meta title.

{{count}} pages have custom canonical URLs; confirm that they are still valid.
advanced.seo_audit_issue_duplicate_meta_title_one: The meta title “{{title}}” is used {{count}} time.
advanced.seo_audit_issue_duplicate_meta_title_oth: The meta title “{{title}}” is used {{count}} times.
advanced.seo_audit_issue_homepage_meta_title_too_: The homepage meta title is {{length}} characters long; the maximum is {{max}}.
advanced.seo_audit_issue_kb_article_titles_missin: {{count}} published knowledge base article has an empty title.
{{count}} published knowledge base articles have empty titles.

advanced.seo_audit_issue_missing_homepage_h1: The homepage is missing its H1 heading.
advanced.seo_audit_issue_missing_homepage_meta_ti: The homepage is missing its default meta title.
advanced.seo_audit_issue_missing_meta_description: The homepage is missing its default meta description.

advanced.seo_audit_issue_open_graph_not_enabled: Open Graph tags are not enabled.
advanced.seo_audit_issue_open_graph_sharing_disab: Open Graph tags are disabled, so social shares will use generic previews.
advanced.seo_audit_issue_sitemap_empty: The sitemap contains no URLs, so no content is being indexed from it.

advanced.seo_audit_issue_sitemap_low_coverage_oth: The sitemap contains only {{count}} URLs, indicating very low coverage.

advanced.seo_audit_issue_thin_blog_content_other: {{count}} published blog posts have fewer than {{minimum}} characters; thin content can hurt SEO.

advanced.param_time_decay_weight_desc: How strongly post age reduces ranking

reset_all.title: Reset and rebuild every snapshot
reset_all.description: Cancel older prerender work and start one fresh, tenant-aware rebuild of every public page, including each tenant's landing page, custom pages, and blog content.
reset_all.safety: The current complete cache stays live unless the new route plan renders and validates successfully. Failed rebuilds do not replace the last known-good generation.
reset_all.queued: Fresh rebuild #{{id}} queued for {{tenants}} tenants and {{routes}} routes.
reset_all.failed: The fresh rebuild could not be scheduled. No live snapshots were removed.

prerender.description: Bot-only server-rendered snapshots. Monitor coverage, detect staleness, and force refreshes.

guide.title: Plain-English guide
guide.intro: The prerender engine makes saved HTML copies of public pages for search engines and social previews. Members use the normal app; these snapshots are only for crawlers.

bot_only.title: What gets rendered
bot_only.body: Public tenant pages, such as about pages, listings, blog posts, and public groups. Private member areas are not supposed to be rendered.

tenant_scope.title: Tenant safety
tenant_scope.body: When a page belongs to one tenant, actions should include that tenant slug. The engine now checks host and tenant path before touching snapshots.

dry_run.title: Preview first
dry_run.body: A dry run shows what would happen without deleting files or queuing work. Use it before purge or repair actions.

repair.title: Repair stuck queue
repair.body: This is not a content reset. It only releases jobs that look abandoned and lets the worker resume after repeated failures.

workflows.title: What are you trying to do?
workflows.description: Start with the plain task, then use the tab it opens. This keeps routine work away from the risky controls.

refresh_one_tenant.title: Refresh one tenant
refresh_one_tenant.body: Use when public content changed for a single community. Enter its tenant slug before queuing work.

find_stale_pages.title: Find stale or missing pages
find_stale_pages.body: Check coverage first to see which tenants have old snapshots, missing pages, or broken assets.

inspect_cache.title: Inspect saved pages
inspect_cache.body: Search the cache, inspect SEO tags, and recache selected snapshots using tenant-safe routes.

investigate_failures.title: Investigate failed renders
investigate_failures.body: Review routes in the backoff window before retrying, purging, or repairing the queue.

check_tenant_safety.title: Check one tenant is safe
check_tenant_safety.body: Inspect exactly what this tenant should have, what is saved, and whether any snapshots belong elsewhere.

analytics.empty: No analytics available. Bot access log may be empty.

hints.spoofed: claimed major bot, failed IP range

errors.bulk_enqueue: Bulk enqueue failed (some tenants may have queued)

messages.no_stale: No stale tenants - coverage is healthy

summary.needs_work: {{needing}} of {{total}} tenants have missing, stale, or asset-broken routes.

auto_recache.description: Looks for snapshots that are old or whose source content changed, then queues safe background refreshes. This normally runs automatically; use this button when you want to check immediately.
auto_recache.title: Find pages that need refreshing

drift.description: Compares each tenant sitemap with saved snapshots so pages missing from the cache, or older than the sitemap says they should be, can be refreshed.
drift.title: Compare sitemap with cache

messages.purge_dry_run: Dry run: {{count}} snapshots would be purged
messages.purge_dry_run_one: Dry run: {{count}} snapshots would be purged
messages.purge_dry_run_other: Dry run: {{count}} snapshots would be purged

purge_ungated.confirm_message: This permanently deletes saved pages that are outside their tenant's current route plan. Confirm that you reviewed the preview first.
purge_ungated.description: Removes saved pages that the tenant should not have, such as pages left behind after a feature was turned off. Use preview first; tenant-owned dynamic pages are protected.
purge_ungated.title: Remove snapshots that should not exist

modal.body_suffix: job whose worker has been silent for more than 30 minutes back in the queue, and allow the queue to run again.
modal.title: Repair stuck prerender queue
modal.warning: Use this only when the queue appears stuck. It does not delete content or change tenant data, but a still-running worker could duplicate work.

inventory.truncated: Inventory reached the {{count}}-snapshot safety limit. Narrow the tenant filter before taking bulk action.

inspect.load_failed: This snapshot could not be loaded. Previous inspection data has been cleared.
inspect.integrity_mismatch: bytes changed since render - expected sha256 {{expected}}..., got {{actual}}...
inspect.integrity_missing: no sha256 sidecar - snapshot predates integrity verification or was hand-edited
inspect.integrity_ok: bytes match the sha256 written at render time
inspect.integrity_unreadable: sha256 sidecar exists but is malformed
inspect.title: Title

errors.cancel: Could not cancel - job may have started
errors.retry: Retry failed - original job may still be in flight

failures.description_middle: Routes in this list are skipped automatically during the failure-backoff window (default 6h). Use
failures.description_prefix: Cache paths that failed during a recent prerender run.
failures.description_suffix: on the Overview tab to retry immediately.

force_refresh.description: Queue fresh snapshots. Add a tenant slug to refresh only one tenant; leave both fields empty only when you deliberately want every tenant refreshed.
force_refresh.force: Refresh even if a snapshot already exists
force_refresh.title: Queue a refresh

hints.unexpected: Saved snapshots outside the current tenant route plans

purge.description_prefix: Delete saved HTML snapshots that match a path pattern. Add a tenant slug when the route belongs to one tenant. Use
purge.description_suffix: for any descendant. Preview before deleting. Examples:

all_tenants_warning.body: Leaving tenant slug blank will delete matching snapshots across every tenant. This is only for platform-wide cleanup after you have previewed the exact files.
all_tenants_warning.confirm: I understand this delete applies to every tenant
all_tenants_warning.title: All-tenant delete

errors.confirm_all_tenants: Confirm the all-tenant delete before continuing
errors.preview_required: Run a matching preview before deleting snapshots.
errors.confirm_text: Type {{phrase}} to confirm this live delete.

messages.dry_run: Dry run: {{count}} snapshots would be purged
messages.dry_run_one: Dry run: {{count}} snapshots would be purged
messages.dry_run_other: Dry run: {{count}} snapshots would be purged

purge.title: Delete snapshots by route pattern

preview_gate.title: Preview required before live delete
preview_gate.required: A live delete is locked until you preview the same route pattern and tenant scope.
preview_gate.ready: Matching preview found. The live delete is limited to the {{count}} matching snapshots shown by the preview.
preview_gate.ready_one: Matching preview found. The live delete is limited to the {{count}} matching snapshots shown by the preview.
preview_gate.ready_other: Matching preview found. The live delete is limited to the {{count}} matching snapshots shown by the preview.

ttl_inspector.description_prefix: Check how long a route is allowed to stay cached before it is considered old. The matching
ttl_inspector.error: Lookup failed - check the route format (must start with "/")
ttl_inspector.path_only: Path only - no scheme or host

result.other_patterns: Other patterns that match this route:

ttl_inspector.title: Freshness rule lookup

sitemap_explorer.description_prefix: See the public routes the engine believes belong to this tenant: built-in public pages plus dynamic URLs from
sitemap_explorer.description_suffix: The worker uses this list when it refreshes snapshots.
sitemap_explorer.error: Lookup failed - check the tenant slug
sitemap_explorer.title: Tenant route list

readonly.prefix: Read-only view - action buttons are disabled because the prerender engine operates across every tenant. Sign in with a
readonly.suffix: account to enqueue jobs, purge snapshots, or trigger drift detection.

prerender.title: Prerender Engine

tenant_safety.title: Tenant safety inspector
tenant_safety.description: Check one community before refreshing or deleting anything. This view compares the tenant route plan with the saved cache and explains why each snapshot exists.

errors.load: Failed to load tenant safety report.

sections.attention_limited: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}} saved snapshots needing attention.

tenant_safety.empty: Enter a tenant slug to inspect its route plan and saved snapshots.
tenant_safety.empty_attention: This tenant has no missing, stale, asset-broken, or unexpected snapshots.

reasons.sitemap: Published by this tenant sitemap as public content.
reasons.unexpected: Saved for this tenant, but not present in the current static route set or sitemap plan.
reasons.feature_disabled: Would require the {{value}} tenant feature, which is currently off.
reasons.module_disabled: Would require the {{value}} tenant module, which is currently off.

help.title: How to read this
help.expected: Expected routes are pages the engine believes this tenant should expose publicly.
help.unexpected: Unexpected snapshots are saved files that no longer match the tenant plan. They are the highest-risk items to clean up.
help.next_step: Use preview-only cleanup first. Only delete after the preview shows the tenant and routes you expect.

cleanup.title: Cleanup available
cleanup.body: Unexpected snapshots can usually be removed with the cleanup tool in Overview. Preview first, then apply only when the tenant list is correct.

next_public.title: Next.js public frontend readiness
next_public.description: Read-only shadow-mode status for the Next.js public frontend. This page does not enable public routing or change prerender behaviour.
next_public.error: Next.js readiness could not be loaded.

values.public_traffic_next: Public traffic is served by Next.js

validation_issues.manifest_not_shadow: Route ownership manifest is not in shadow mode.
validation_issues.public_route_invalid: A public route entry is malformed.
validation_issues.public_route_missing_fields: A public route is missing required fields.
validation_issues.public_route_duplicate_pattern: A public route pattern is duplicated.
validation_issues.public_route_duplicate_key: A public route key is duplicated.
validation_issues.public_route_collides_with_private_prefi: A public route collides with a private Vite route prefix.
validation_issues.public_route_collides_with_private_patte: A public route collides with a private Vite route pattern.
validation_issues.vite_private_prefix_missing_required: Required Vite private route prefix is missing.
validation_issues.vite_private_pattern_missing_required: Required Vite private route pattern is missing.
validation_issues.content_sources_not_laravel_api: Content sources must use Laravel public APIs.
validation_issues.content_sources_allow_next_database_quer: Next.js content sources must not query the database.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_invalid: An API-backed route entry is malformed.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_missing_fields: An API-backed route is missing required fields.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_duplicate_key: An API-backed route key is duplicated.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_not_in_manifest: An API-backed route is missing from the public route manifest.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_not_get: API-backed public routes must use GET.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_not_laravel_v2_endpoint: API-backed routes must use relative Laravel v2 endpoints.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_private_endpoint: API-backed public routes must not use private Laravel v2 namespaces.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_endpoint_not_plain_path: API-backed route endpoints must be plain paths without query strings or fragments.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_endpoint_has_path_trave: API-backed route endpoints must not contain path traversal segments.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_param_mismatch: API endpoint parameters must match the public route pattern.
validation_issues.api_backed_route_not_registered: API-backed route endpoint is not registered in Laravel.

email_deliverability.title: Email Deliverability
email_deliverability.subtitle: Track trigger evidence, send attempts, provider status, and suppressed recipients for this tenant.

status_breakdown.title: Status Breakdown
status_breakdown.subtitle: A compact view of the current tenant's send outcomes for the selected window.

trigger_issues.title: Trigger Audit Issues
trigger_issues.subtitle: Source rows where an email or notification should have fired, but the audit does not have reliable delivery evidence.
trigger_issues.empty: No trigger audit issues for the selected window.

queues.title: Queue Diagnostics
queues.subtitle: Failed, suppressed, or stale pending email queue rows for this tenant.
queues.empty: No failed, suppressed, or stale email queue rows.

logs.title: Email Attempt Log
logs.subtitle: Search every send attempt by recipient, category, status, and date.
logs.empty: No emails match the current filters.

suppressions.title: Suppression List
suppressions.subtitle: Platform-wide recipients that providers have bounced, blocked, invalidated, or unsubscribed.
suppressions.empty: No suppressed recipients match the current filters.
suppressions.confirm_remove: Remove {{email}} from the suppression list? They will be eligible to receive email again.

email_log_missing.title: Email log missing
email_log_missing.body: Email health cannot be audited because the email log table is missing.

recent_email_failures.title: Recent email failures
recent_email_failures.body: {{count}} email attempts failed, bounced, or were suppressed in the last {{window_hours}} hours.

critical_email_failures.title: Critical email failures
critical_email_failures.body: {{count}} critical account or security emails failed in the last {{window_hours}} hours.

notification_queue_failures.title: Notification queue failures
notification_queue_failures.body: {{count}} queued notifications failed in the last {{window_hours}} hours.

notification_queue_suppressed.title: Notification emails suppressed
notification_queue_suppressed.body: {{count}} queued notification emails were suppressed in the last {{window_hours}} hours.

notification_queue_stale_processing.title: Stale notification queue
notification_queue_stale_processing.body: {{count}} notifications have been processing for more than {{minutes}} minutes.

newsletter_queue_failures.title: Newsletter queue failures
newsletter_queue_failures.body: {{count}} newsletter recipients failed in the last {{window_hours}} hours.

newsletter_queue_stale_processing.title: Stale newsletter queue
newsletter_queue_stale_processing.body: {{count}} newsletter recipients have been processing for more than {{minutes}} minutes.

no_recent_email_activity.title: No recent email activity

group_invites_without_email_attempt.title: Group invite email did not trigger

group_members_tenant_mismatch.title: Group membership tenant mismatch
group_members_tenant_mismatch.body: {{count}} group memberships belong to a different tenant than their group. These rows risk wrong-tenant role and notification routing.

group_member_joined_without_owner_notifi.title: Group join notification did not queue

notification_queue_missing_tenant_id.title: Notification queue missing tenant

notification_queue_tenant_mismatch.title: Notification queue tenant mismatch
notification_queue_tenant_mismatch.body: {{count}} queued notifications belong to a different tenant than their recipient user. These rows risk wrong-tenant routing.

notifications_missing_tenant_id.title: Notifications missing tenant
notifications_missing_tenant_id.body: {{count}} in-app notifications have no tenant ownership, so users may not see them consistently.

notifications_tenant_mismatch.title: Notifications tenant mismatch
notifications_tenant_mismatch.body: {{count}} in-app notifications belong to a different tenant than their recipient user. These rows risk cross-tenant visibility failures.

newsletter_queue_tenant_mismatch.title: Newsletter queue tenant mismatch

direct_email_send_paths_remaining.body: {{count}} raw email send paths still bypass the unified notification dispatcher. Keep hardening these paths until every module routes through the auditable dispatcher.

email_dispatch_missing_explicit_tenant.title: Dispatcher email missing explicit tenant
email_dispatch_missing_explicit_tenant.body: {{count}} email dispatcher call sites still rely on inferred tenant context. Pass tenant_id or tenantId explicitly so every queued, cron, webhook, and cross-tenant send is auditable.
